# Pull Request

## Description
Provide a brief summary of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring

## Verification
- [ ] I have verified that `cargo test --workspace` passes.
- [ ] I have run `cargo clippy --workspace` to check for lints.
- [ ] The changes maintain the byte-identical round-trip guarantee (if modifying the parser).
